arts.ttl: Diego Simeone unsure over two positions for Real Madrid showdown
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid boss Diego Simeone faces some key team selection calls for their UEFA Champions League showdown with Real Madrid. Los Rojiblancos sealed a late 1-0 weekend win at home to Athletic Club as Julian Alvarez came off the bench to snatch all three points.
